svg.aria-label: STRATA story: sleeping BMO awakened by Cr(VI), chases it, glows green, reduces Cr(VI) to Cr(III), then triggers the kill switch.
svg.title: STRATA story animation
svg.desc: Animated story: a sleeping engineered E. coli (BMO) is awakened by an incoming hexavalent chromium ion, chases it across two lanes, catches and biosenses it (green sfGFP glow), reduces it to trivalent chromium (NemA), then triggers the holin-endolysin kill switch and lyses.
svg.text: // STRATA — Tri-modular bioremediation, told in 6 beats

g.text: no Cr(VI) → kill switch primed, biosensor off
ChrB sensor activated, holin repression engaged
BMO chases Cr(VI) across two lanes
M1 ChrB-sfGFP · M2 NemA chromate reductase · M3 Holin-Endolysin
